'''Andru''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] miner on [[Katanos VII]]. He was afraid of the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], but let [[Obs Kaj]] escape, ending up exiled from the colony.

{{Char-stub}}
